prerequisites: An Aha! account with access to the data you want to extract (the API key grants access with the permissions of the user who generated it).
Your Aha! account-specific URL in the form https://<yourcompany>.aha.io, used for the `url` config field.
An Aha! API key generated through the Aha! user interface (used for the `api_key` config field).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with an Aha! API key supplied in the `api_key` field. API keys are generated through the Aha! user interface; each key is specific to a user and an account and grants access with the permissions of the user that generated it. The connector sends the key as an `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header. Keys can be revoked independently and continue to work even if the user changes their password.

setupSteps.title: Locate your Aha! account URL
setupSteps.body: Determine your account-specific Aha! domain, which has the form https://<yourcompany>.aha.io. All Aha! REST API access is over HTTPS using this account-specific domain. You will enter this value in the required `url` config field.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Aha! and generate an API key through the Aha! user interface. Each API key is specific to your user and account and grants access with your permissions. A user can have multiple API keys, and they can be revoked independently.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in the required `api_key` field and your account domain (https://<yourcompany>.aha.io) in the required `url` field. The connector authenticates each request by sending the key as an `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header.
